positive: A stylized symmetrical composition featuring a serene, ethereal forest scene under a twilight sky. The central element is a glowing, ancient tree with intricate, root-like silhouettes reaching into the foreground. Delicate constellations and stylized crescent moons orbit the tree's crown. Include bioluminescent flora and stylized geometric patterns integrated into the negative space and leaves. High contrast, utilizing deep indigos, emerald greens, and luminous gold accents. Clean lines, crisp vector aesthetic, tattoo flash style, highly detailed, designed for apparel print, central focus, perfect silhouette art.
